title: Italian Casserole
description: A classic Italian-inspired casserole made with melted cheese and a mediterranean twist. Serve hot and enjoy!
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the tomato sauce over medium heat.
Add the Italian seasoning and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, mix together the shredded mozzarella cheese and sliced olives.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, spread a layer of tomato sauce on the bottom.
Arrange half of the mozzarella and olive mixture on top of the sauce.
Add the artichoke hearts and sprinkle with basil leaves.
Repeat the layers, starting with the tomato sauce, then the remaining mozzarella and olive mixture.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let the casserole rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
